buyer-login.title: Welcome back
buyer-login.subtitle: Login and complete your auctions... you can win big today!

validation.phoneNumbersOnly: The number must contain digits only
validation.invalidSaudiPhone: Please enter a valid Saudi number starting with 5 and consisting of 9 digits

sidebar.heading: What you will get after register:
points: Access to trusted offers and auctions near you
Buy and sell easily from individuals and companies
Save ads and favorite auctions for later reference

buyer-verify-otp.title: Verify your number
buyer-verify-otp.subtitle: We've sent a 4-digit code to your number

buyer-forgot-password.title: Forgot Password?
buyer-forgot-password.subtitle: No worries, enter your registered mobile number and we'll send you a verification code.

buyer-reset-password-success.title: Password Reset Successfully!
buyer-reset-password-success.subtitle: You can now login with your new password.

buyer-register-success.title: Verified Successfully!
buyer-register-success.subtitle: Your account is ready, let's start!
buyer-register-success.redirect: You will be redirected to the home page now...

seller-start.title: Verify your identity
seller-start.description: Before continuing the selling process, we need to verify your identity to ensure safety and trust among all users.
seller-start.helper: Verification usually takes no more than an hour.

seller-pending.title: Your request is under review
seller-pending.description: Your data has been received successfully. Our team is reviewing your information now, and we will send you a notification as soon as your seller account is activated.
seller-pending.helper: Verification usually takes no more than an hour.

seller-success.title: Congratulations!
seller-success.description: Your seller account has been successfully activated.
seller-success.helper: Now you can start adding your products and showcasing them in auctions or at a fixed price.

seller-rejected.title: Verification Request Not Accepted
seller-rejected.description: Please check your information and try again.

seller-verify.title: Seller Account Verification
seller-verify.description: To be able to sell and post ads on Doi, we need to verify your identity to ensure a safe and reliable experience for all users.

sidebar.heading: What you will get after verification:
points: Post ads and participate in auctions
Increase buyer trust in your account
Distinguish your account as a trusted seller

seller-payment.title: Seller Account Verification
seller-payment.description: To be able to sell and post ads on Doi, we need to verify your identity to ensure a safe and reliable experience for all users.

form.title: Verify as Seller
form.subtitle: Please choose if you are an individual or a company, and fill in your details to activate your account for selling.

hooks.otpSentDescription: We have sent a reset link to your email. Please open the email and enter the verification code to complete the process.

auth-guard.title: To continue bidding or buying, you need an account.
auth-guard.subtitle: Registration is fast and simple! It unlocks all auctions for you.
